mapper.select: SELECT GREATEST( COALESCE((SELECT MAX(id) FROM ml_user), 0), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(user_id) FROM user_event), 0), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(user_id) FROM user_reco), 0) )
SELECT ( EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ml_user WHERE id = #{userId}) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_event WHERE user_id = #{userId}) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_reco WHERE user_id = #{userId}) )
